brief: Escalating US-Iran strikes and a deadly Bangkok bar fire dominate headlines, while research explores AI-assisted creativity and data communication challenges.
news_summary: US strikes Iran for third consecutive night as UAE reports tanker hits in Hormuz; Bangkok bar fire death toll reaches 30 with negligence suspected.
papers_summary: Papers examine AI tools for collaborative writing, emotional expression in climate TikTok videos, and issues in data narratives.

en.brief: Escalating US-Iran strikes and a deadly Bangkok bar fire dominate headlines, while research explores AI-assisted creativity and data communication challenges.
en.news_summary: US strikes Iran for third consecutive night as UAE reports tanker hits in Hormuz; Bangkok bar fire death toll reaches 30 with negligence suspected.
en.papers_summary: Papers examine AI tools for collaborative writing, emotional expression in climate TikTok videos, and issues in data narratives.

zh.brief: 今日中国政坛重磅消息：马兴瑞被双开；台风巴威横扫华东后北移致河北严重水灾；曼谷酒吧大火死亡人数升至30人。学术方面暂无重点。
zh.news_summary: 马兴瑞被开除党籍公职，成为习近平时代又一位落马的政治局委员；台风巴威给华东华北带来强降雨，河北宽城约1800人被困；曼谷酒吧大火死亡升至30人，警方调查疏忽责任；英属直布罗陀与西班牙撤除边境检查站；霸王龙化石将拍卖，估值创纪录；美国参议员葛兰姆去世，曾为特朗普盟友；中国留学生被指为墨西哥‘芬太尼王’。

todays_image.caption: Like the Lobophora sp. clinging to reefs, the Strait of Hormuz anchors global oil flows, now churning under strikes and tanker hits.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
